design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed = hash('Super for recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews' + 'niche_landing' + 'recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews' + '2026-07-06T03:04:05.310285+00:00') → architecture=workflow-command-center, type=Cabinet Grotesk. AIDA Check: Hero (Attention), Proof & market context (Interest), Workflow demos & guide (Desire), CTA band (Action). Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk primary with system fallbacks. Hero Math Verification: clamp(44px–76px) over max-width 1120px yields consistent 2–3 line headline at common breakpoints. Bento Density Verification: compare-grid and bento use grid-auto-flow: dense to avoid gaps. GSAP Motion Selection: image-scale-fade-scroll + hover-physics with guards if GSAP unavailable. Label Sweep & Button Check: All CTAs high-contrast black/white pills linking to Super app; competitor labels present (Folk, Orchids, Siri, ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok).
headline: Super for recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews

site_brief.audience: recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work. Include a long-form field guide for this niche with concrete workflows, how-to steps, role-specific examples, objections, and a setup checklist.
queries: recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews AI assistant
recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for recruiters sourcing candidates and coordinating interviews

summary: A premium niche landing page showing how recruiters can use Super’s personal AI agents to source candidates, operate real hiring tools, coordinate interviews, and reuse a computer-use cache for faster, cheaper repeated workflows—grounded in current agentic AI and workflow automation evidence.
